# Sashwin Foundation: Architectural Excellence & Luxury Investments

## Executive Summary
Sashwin Foundation is a premier luxury construction, engineering, and architectural firm based in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with over 25 years of documented expertise. The firm operates under the philosophy: "We Build Assets… Not Expenses."

## Core Offerings

### 1. Mishti Holiday Homes (Resort Investment)
- **Concept**: A luxury resort community villa investment model.
- **Location**: Tholampalayam Road, Coimbatore (Near Mettupalayam Road).
- **Structure**: Only 35 exclusive shares available.
- **Financials**: ₹48.50 Lakhs per share. Up to 50% loan support.
- **Returns**: 50:50 rental revenue sharing. No lock-in period.
- **Verification**: Built to ISO standards with managed hospitality.

### 2. Residential Masterpieces
- **Locations**: Karamadai to Vellingadu Road, Coimbatore.
- **Pricing**: 2BHK starting from ₹25 Lakhs; 3BHK from ₹47.5 Lakhs.
- **Financing**: Up to 90% loan support with FREE interior design included.

### 3. Construction Vertical
- **Rate**: Starting from ₹2,650 per sq.ft.
- **USP**: Direct labour force (no outsourcing middlemen), in-house architects, material transparency, and on-site supervision.

## Operational Details
- **Primary Office**: #347 D, Sakthi complex, 1st floor, thiruvalluvar street, vellaikinaru pirivu, G.N.Mills, Coimbatore - 641026.
- **Chennai Office**: No.11, Devaki Nagar, Ponniammanmedu, Chennai – 600 110.
- **Contact**: +91 90475 90675 | sashwinfoundation@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://sashwinfoundation.com

## Technical Standards
All projects are ISO compliant. The firm utilizes Integrated BIM (Building Information Modeling) and Thermodynamic engineering for half-century longevity.
